Building The Future

When it comes to design, we don't just think outside the box - we throw the box away and create something truly unique. Welcome to The Design Umbrella. We don't believe in one-size-fits-all design, we create custom solutions that are tailored to your unique needs and preferences, with a focus on functionality, beauty, and sustainability.

We're like Mary Poppins, but for design

we've got everything under our umbrella, from master planning to interior design and everything in between.

You bring the vision, we'll bring the umbrella

The Design Umbrella, your go-to source for innovative design solutions and expert material selection.

We don't just design spaces, we curate them

The Design Umbrella, where creativity and functionality come together to create unforgettable spaces.

Rain or shine, The Design Umbrella has got you covered

Our team of experts is here to help you bring your vision to life, no matter the project size or complexity.

What We Do

Interior Design:

We curate spaces that feel like a warm embrace.

Architecture

We believe that every building should tell a story, and we're here to help you tell yours.

Urban Planning

We see cities as canvases, and we're ready to paint something beautiful.

Research

We're passionate about exploring new ideas and pushing the boundaries of what's possible in design.

Consultation

We're your trusted advisors and partners in design, here to help you bring your vision to life.

PMC (Project Management Consultancy)

We make sure every project runs like a well-oiled machine, so you can sit back and enjoy the results.

The Process

At The Design Umbrella, we believe that a successful project begins with a well-defined process.

Discovery

During the discovery phase, we meet with you to discuss your vision and goals for the project, as well as any specific requirements or constraints that need to be taken into consideration.

Design

Based on the information gathered in the discovery phase, we develop a design concept that reflects your vision and meets your requirements. We work closely with you to refine the design and select materials and finishes that will bring your vision to life.

Development

Once the design is finalized, we move on to the development phase, where we prepare detailed documentation, including drawings, specifications, and other necessary information. We also work with contractors and other professionals to ensure that the project is executed according to the design and documentation.

Delivery

During the delivery phase, we conduct a final walkthrough to ensure that everything is in order and that you are completely satisfied with the result. We also provide ongoing support and maintenance to ensure that your project continues to meet your needs and expectations over time.

Process / Services

At The Design Umbrella, we believe that a successful project begins with a well-defined process.
